errors.unexpected_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.

ai.geo_permission_request: 📍 To find places nearby, I need access to your geolocation. Please allow access…
ai.found_places: I found some places for you:
ai.geo_failed_with_tip: 📍 Failed to get geolocation. Try specifying a city in your request, e.g., "cafe in Krakow".
ai.geo_unavailable: 📍 Geolocation is unavailable. Try specifying a city in your request.
ai.response_failed: GastroGuide is not responding. Please try again.
ai.general_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

language_settings.title: Language & Region
language_settings.language_note: This will change the interface language. Search results and location descriptions will still be available in their original language.

explore.city_tagline: Top restaurants and hidden gems in the heart of {{city}}.

location.not_found_desc: This place may have been removed or the link is incorrect.
location.note_placeholder: Remember their best table, your favorite wine, or a dish to avoid next time…
location.review_placeholder: Share the details of your visit…
location.review_submitted: Thank you! Your review is awaiting moderation.
location.review_failed: Failed to submit review. Please try again.

reviews.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!
reviews.placeholder: Share the details of your visit…

saved.title: Saved
saved.empty_desc: Tap the heart on any place to save it here for later.

visited.title: Visited
visited.count_one: {{count}} place visited so far — keep exploring!
visited.count_other: {{count}} places visited so far — keep exploring!
visited.empty_desc: Open a place and tap "Mark as Visited" to track your food journey.

onboarding.step_hint: Step {{current}} of {{total}} · You can change this later in Profile
onboarding.cuisines_title: What do you love to eat?
onboarding.cuisines_desc: Pick all that apply — we'll personalise your feed.
onboarding.vibes_desc: Choose one or more atmospheres you enjoy.
onboarding.budget_desc: Select all budgets you're comfortable with.

pwa.install_ios: Tap Share → "Add to Home Screen" in Safari
pwa.install_desc: Instant launch, offline access, no App Store needed

dashboard.perfect_spots: Perfect spots to match your taste.
dashboard.hot_spots: Hot spots everyone is talking about.
dashboard.empty_desc: Be the first to add a spot
dashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back, {{name}}! Glad to see you again in {{city}}!
dashboard.no_nearby_desc: There are no places within 1km of your current location.
dashboard.test_mode_disclaimer: *the application is in test mode and there may be service interruptions. we apologize in advance.

profile.sw_checking: Checking for updates… New version will download in the background.
profile.sw_not_registered: Service Worker not registered. PWA might not be installed.
profile.sw_unsupported: Offline mode is not supported by this browser.
profile.no_contributions: You haven't added any places yet.
profile.no_dna: No preferences set yet. Edit your profile to describe your culinary DNA.
profile.no_atmosphere: No atmosphere preferred yet. How about something cozy?
profile.no_features: No specific features required yet. WiFi? Outdoor seating?
profile.biosync_desc: Connect your wearable to get personalised restaurant recommendations based on your current physical state and energy levels.
profile.dine_desc: Find a dining buddy! Match with fellow foodies nearby who share your taste Profile and are looking for company.
profile.feedback_desc: We'd love to hear your thoughts, suggestions, or bug reports.
profile.title: Profile

profile_edit.title: Edit Profile
profile_edit.dna_hint: Describe your tastes, allergies, or what you crave most. GastroGuide uses this to personalise recommendations.
profile_edit.dna_placeholder: E.g., I love spicy Asian food, authentic Italian pasta, and quiet specialty coffee shops. I'm vegan and avoid cilantro...
profile_edit.atm_hint: What kind of vibe do you prefer? Quiet, vibrant, romantic, or perfect for work?
profile_edit.atm_placeholder: E.g., I prefer quiet, hidden places with dim lighting and jazz. Perfect for long reading sessions...
profile_edit.features_hint: Any specific requirements like high-speed WiFi, pet-friendly, or outdoor seating?
profile_edit.features_placeholder: E.g., High-speed WiFi is a must. Also, I usually travel with my dog, so pet-friendly places only please...

add_place.title: Add a Venue
add_place.description: Share your find with the community. Earn rating points after successful moderation.
add_place.tip_placeholder: e.g. Come before 9 am for fresh croissants and ask for the window seat.
add_place.must_try_placeholder: e.g. Almond croissant and flat white
add_place.tags_placeholder: e.g. Cozy, Scandinavian style, Remote work…
add_place.submit_notice: By adding a venue, you agree to the GastroMap community guidelines.
add_place.success_desc: Thank you for your contribution to the GastroMap community. Our moderation team will review the information and you will receive a push notification once the venue appears on the map!

labels.hidden_gem_desc: A unique place according to the app author

filter.title: Filters
filter.geo_denied: Location access denied — enable it to use radius filter
filter.geo_unsupported: Geolocation not supported by this browser

admin.bulk_reindex_confirm: Run background reindexing for all objects?
admin.bulk_embedding_confirm:
Update only empty embeddings?

OK = only empty
Cancel = all locations
admin.locations_subtitle: Manage the database of restaurants, cafes, and gastro-spots.
admin.data_load_error_desc: Failed to load data from database. Check Supabase configuration or network connection.

manifesto.title: Travels in Search of Taste
manifesto.description: GastroMap is a project born from a personal passion for travel and the search for perfect locations. I made this app free because I believe useful tools should be accessible to everyone.
manifesto.creator_story: I am currently developing GastroMap on my own. Your contribution — whether it's a new location or supporting the project — helps the app grow.
manifesto.join_description: Help us build the most authentic food map.
